content: The full Pontos pre-release analysis with an intro, cleaned-up audio and lofi music for you~ https://youtu.be/8kzY5aipUVI

embeds.title: A Scarily Lengthy Analysis of Pontos in Morimens
embeds.description: It's been a long time since I've done one of these. I've seen a lot of community debate and interest over Pontos, and I really believe their gameplay kit to have a fascinating design compared to most characters.
